notes: Recognisably the same posed squid with correct mantle/fin/arm layout, but the two long extended tentacles are merged into the silhouette and the linework is ragged with noisy scattered stipple.
specific_issues: upper long tentacle merged into mantle outline rather than drawn as a separate appendage
lower long tentacle missing or fused with arm cluster
silhouette contour broken and jittery along mantle and fin edges
stipple scattered randomly instead of concentrated in chromatophore fields visible in the photo
arm count unclear — hard to read 8 arms + 2 tentacles
small fragmentary line noise inside body reads as photo-trace artifact rather than scientific restraint
